content:
I am currently a master student in Huazhong University of Science and Technology (Sep.2018-Jun.2021), majoring in Computer Science. I am a member of Cluster and Grid Computing Lab (CGCL) and advised by Prof. Feng Zhao. I mainly focus on information retrieval. At present, I am working on a project related to knowledge graph and visualization.
I received my Bachelor’s degree (Sep.2014-Jun.2018, major: Software Engineering) in Hunan University, Changsha.

title: Yafan Huang
